subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #063 The Progress of All Things Within their Own Degree
subcodes.first_line: Know that nothing that exists remains in a state of repose—that is, all things are in motion.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بدان که شیء موجود در مقامی توقف ننماید یعنی جمیع اشیاء متحرک است
subcodes.subjects: @progress only takes place within its own degree, @law of transformation and change, @soul; spirit after death, @existence and nonexistence; preexistence
